summary: Gangbuk went DPK strongly (천준호 갑 57.75, 박용진 을 64.45 — Park Yong-jin's massive win). Working-middle-class residential base, consistent progressive preference.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: 박용진's 64.45% was one of the largest 2020 DPK margins in Seoul.

issues.label: 박용진 personal profile (을)
issues.description: Park Yong-jin built strong national profile during this term.
